chin_hakha.welcome_to_the_art_design_studio: 🎨 Milem le Design Studio ah na rat cu kan lawmh!
chin_hakha.explore_15_interactive_tools_that_teac: Tools 15 kha hmang law zoh — rong ruahnak, nambat in milem sernak, amah te in a i sermi design, le mi vialte nih an hmuh khawhmi kha an in cawnpiak. Tab pakhat cio cu sernak hmun phundang an si. Hi hna hi na ser khawh:
chin_hakha.explore_hsl_color_space_interactively: HSL rong hmun kha na kut in zoh
chin_hakha.mix_paints_with_subtractive_color_theo: Rong ka lakmi ruahnak (subtractive) hmangin rong chawh
chin_hakha.draw_with_rotational_reflective_symmet: Vaknak le thlalang aa tluk tawknak hmangin suai
chin_hakha.mathematical_spiral_patterns_hypotroch: Nambat in a vakmi milem phun (hypotrochoids)
chin_hakha.flow_fields_particles_starfields_auror: Luannak hmun, thil tete (particles), arfi hmun, aurora
chin_hakha.virtual_spin_painting_with_physics: Physics phunglam a zulmi rong vaknak
chin_hakha.geometric_string_patterns_on_pegs: Nail cungah geometry a zulmi hri milem
chin_hakha.optical_illusions_and_visual_tricks: Mit hlennak le hmuhnak lam a hlenmi
chin_hakha.repeating_tile_patterns_like_m_c_esche: M.C. Escher bantuk in aa cang ṭheumi tile milem
chin_hakha.design_and_export_css_gradient_pattern: CSS gradient milem ser law chuahpi
chin_hakha.harmony_desc: Aw aa remmi le aa rem lomi kha tahchunh, frequency ratio kha milem he pehtlaih, hla pehtlaihnak kha hmuhnak aa remnak ah thlen
chin_hakha.wcag_contrast_checker_for_accessibilit: Mi vialte nih an hmuh khawh nakhnga WCAG rong aa dannak checker
chin_hakha.color_theory_additive_vs_subtractive_m: Rong ruahnak (a i telhmi le a i lakmi chawhnak, rong aa remmi, HSL/RGB), nambat in a kawimi milem (hypotrochoids, Lissajous), fractals le amah he aa lohmi, tessellation geometry, op art ah mit nih zeitindah a hmuh, WCAG hmuh khawhnak phunglam, le computer milem. Tool pakhat cio nih a dawtnak chungah a ummi nambat kha an in cawnpiak.
chin_hakha.got_it_let_s_create: Ka hngalh cang — ser u sih! 🎨
chin_hakha.color_wheel_hsl_hsv_complementary_pair: Rong Chakuang — HSL/HSV + aa remmi rong pahnih
chin_hakha.hue_0_360_around_the_wheel_saturation_: Hue (chakuang kulh ah 0-360), saturation (rong a thiannak), lightness (a ceunak). Aa remmi cu a ralkhat ah an um, a naihmi cu a pawngah, triadic cu 120° in an i hla. Newton nih 1666 ah rong vialte kha chakuang cungah a chiah.
chin_hakha.color_mixer_subtractive_vs_additive: Rong Chawhtu — a i lakmi le a i telhmi
chin_hakha.paint_and_print_subtractive_cmy_mixes_: Rong le cabu chuahnak = a i lakmi (CMY aa chawh tikah a thim); ceunak le computer hmai = a i telhmi (RGB aa chawh tikah a rang). Vawlei cu pakhat a si, asinain nambat cu a dang tuk — printer nih K plate in a ruat, TV nih Hz in a ruat.
chin_hakha.pixel_art_bitmap_craft_at_8_8_to_32_32: Pixel Milem — 8×8 in 32×32 tiang bitmap sernak
chin_hakha.each_pixel_is_a_deliberate_decision_ne: Pixel pakhat cio cu ruah in a chiahmi bia khiahnak a si. NES sprites nih hero pakhat kha rong pali lawng he 16×16 chungah an chiah khawh. Bresenham lam sernak nih nambat kehkhat hmang lo in aa kawimi lam a suai.
chin_hakha.symmetry_reflection_rotation_glide: Aa Tluk Tawknak — thlalang, vaknak, le a i hnawhnak
chin_hakha.bilateral_mirror_rotational_n_fold_poi: Pahnih lam (thlalang), vaknak (n-fold), le point. Wallpaper phun 17 nih 2D milem aa cang ṭheumi vialte kha an ṭhen khawh — Escher rian vialte cu mah a si.
chin_hakha.a_small_circle_rolls_inside_a_big_one_: Aa lomi tete cu a lianmi chungah a vak i, cacuang cu a laipi in a hla. Radius pahnih ratio nih pangpar zat a khiah; cacuang hlatnak nih a thanzat a khiah. Hi lentecelhnak thil hi 1965 ah ser a si, asinain nambat cu 1700 kum in a rat.
chin_hakha.generative_algorithm_randomness_as_art: Amah in Sernak — algorithm + hngalh lomi cu milem sertu a si
chin_hakha.sol_lewitt_wrote_instructions_the_wall: Sol LeWitt nih hruainak lawng a ṭial; bang ah rian a ṭuanmi nih a tuah. Nihin: Processing, p5.js, Cinder. “Milem sertu cu phunglam a si, a chuak mi a si lo.”
chin_hakha.spin_art_centripetal_physics_in_paint: Vaknak Milem — rong chungah laipi lam thawhnak physics
chin_hakha.drop_paint_spin_watch_it_fling_outward: Rong ṭum, vak ter, cun a leng lam ah vakin a i thehnak kha zoh. Damien Hirst nih vaknak milem zuar in tangka tampi a hmuh. Salad kuang a vaktu bantuk physics a si; F = mω²r.
chin_hakha.string_art_curves_from_straight_lines: Hri Milem — lam a dingmi in a kawimi lam
chin_hakha.connect_every_n_th_nail_an_envelope_cu: Nail N nak cio kha pehtlaih; envelope kawinak a chuak. Mary Everest Boole nih 1900 hrawng ah sianginn nambat cawnnak ah a chiah. Lam a dingmi in a chuakmi cardioid cu tuchan tiang ah a dawh.
chin_hakha.bridget_riley_s_moir_fields_vasarely_s: Bridget Riley moiré hmun, Vasarely grid. Thluak chungah nithlanak a hmuhtu cell hna cu aa dannak a rangtein aa thlen tikah an ṭuan tuk — cabu cu *a ṭhinlau* bantuk in a langh.
chin_hakha.every_periodic_2d_tiling_fits_one_of_1: Aa cang ṭheumi 2D tiling vialte cu aa tluk tawknak phun 17 chungah pakhat ah an i tel. Escher nih 1936 ah Alhambra a va zoh tikah hi kha a hngalh; cun kum 30 chung a phunphun kha a i zoh dih.
chin_hakha.fractal_self_similar_at_every_scale: Fractal — a zauzat kip ah amah he aa lo
chin_hakha.mandelbrot_1975_cauliflower_coastlines: Mandelbrot 1975. Cauliflower, rili kam, thi hri, khuapi, hnathlak — vialte hi fractal an si. “Khuazing cu bawrbal an si lo, tlang cu kon an si lo, thingkuang cu a nem lo.”
chin_hakha.gradient_smooth_color_transitions: Gradient — rong a nem tein a thlennak
chin_hakha.css_gives_you_linear_radial_and_conic_: CSS nih linear, radial, le conic gradient a in pek. Van chakuang taktak cu rong a i pehmi a ngei (aa ṭhen ṭhenmi a um lo) — “van chakuang rong 7” cu Newton nih hla ruangah amah duhnak in a khiahmi a si.
chin_hakha.90s_magic_eye_craze_each_eye_sees_a_sl: 1990 kum Magic Eye lawmhnak. Mit pakhat cio nih milem a hnawh chuahmi kha an hmuh; na mit kha a hmaan tein na chawh asiloah na ṭhen ahcun, thluak nih an pehtlaih i a thuknak a langhter. Mi 5% cu hmuh an khawh taktak lo — an sualnak a si lo.
chin_hakha.wcag_2_1_normal_text_4_5_1_large_3_1_w: WCAG 2.1: ca tete 4.5:1, ca lianmi 3:1. Aa dannak a tlawm tikah mit a fak lomi hna caah zeiruangah a har — nangmah nih na rel khawh hmanhah. APCA (WCAG 3.0 a hnu deuh) nih mit nih a hmuhmi ceunak a hmang, luminance ratio lawng a si lo.
chin_hakha.harmony_lab_title: Aa Remnak — aw, ratio, le rong
chin_hakha.harmony_lab_hint: Aw aa remmi le aa rem lomi interval kha tahchunh, frequency ratio kha milem he pehtlaih, cun hla pehtlaihnak kha hmuhnak aa remnak ah thlen.
chin_hakha.repeats_a_pattern_around_a_central_poi: nih laipi kulhin milem kha a cang ṭhan.
chin_hakha.starfish_5_fold_snowflakes_6_fold_and_: chungah, tipi arfi (5-fold), vurhau (6-fold), le pangpar hna nih hmun kip ah an langhter.
chin_hakha.tile_patterns_quilts_floor_mosaics: Tile milem, puan aa khuihmi, le innchung dawrh mosaic.
chin_hakha.snowflakes_honeycombs_islamic_star_pat: Vurhau, khuai in, le Islam arfi milem.
chin_hakha.mandala_art_rose_windows_in_cathedrals: Mandala milem, le biakinn lian chungah pangpar tukverh.
chin_hakha.islamic_geometric_art_uses_radial_symm: Islam geometry milem nih kulh lam aa tluk tawknak kha tampi in an hmang. Celtic hri kuhnak, Navajo puan, le Japan chungkhar chikhat (“mon”) hna cu vaknak aa tluk tawknak cungah an dir vialte.
chin_hakha.uses_bilateral_reflection_symmetry_the: nih pahnih lam (thlalang) aa tluk tawknak a hmang — minung hmai, pepi, le hnah chungah kan hmuhmi. Sarang vialte lakah aa tluk tawknak a tam bikmi a si.
chin_hakha.cycles_through_the_color_spectrum_as_y: nih na suai lioah rong vialte chungah a kal i, gradient bantuk mandala kha amah te in a ser.
chin_hakha.the_quick_brown_fox_jumps_over_the_laz: Sialsi a rangmi nih ui a thatlaumi kha a pel
chin_hakha.sculpt_failed: Suainak a tling lo — a fawi deuh in ṭial ṭhan.
chin_hakha.sculpt_presets: A i ser cangmi in thawk
chin_hakha.sculpt_refine_ph: Thlennak ṭial ("a mei a saw deuh")…
chin_hakha.sculpt_gallery_empty: Na khumhmi suainak hna cu hika ah an langh lai.
chin_hakha.maximum_contrast_pop_art_brand_accents: Aa dannak a lian bik. Pop art le brand chikhat.
chin_hakha.triadic_3_equidistant: 🔺 Triadic (pathum aa tluk tein a hlami)
chin_hakha.vibrant_but_balanced_childrens_books_c: A ceu nain aa tluk. Ngakchia cauk le cartoon.
chin_hakha.rich_palette_with_two_opposing_pairs: A ralkhat pahnih a ngeimi palette a rannak.
chin_hakha.analogous_low_saturation_neighbors: 🌅 Analogous (saturation a tlawmmi a naihmi hna)
chin_hakha.calm_harmonious_landscape_painting: A dai, aa rem — ram hmuhning milem.
chin_hakha.energetic_playful_childrens_design: Thazang a ngei, a nawm — ngakchia design.
chin_hakha.adjust_base_hue_saturation_lightness_v: A hrampi hue, saturation, ceunak thlennak, vaknak, le palette a zauzat kha thlen. Widget nih aa remnak palette a nunmi a langhter i, aa remnak phun 5 chungah a ṭhen. Mark a um lo, a phi a um lo — thlen law rong chawhnak zeitluk nih aa remnak phun zeidah a chuahter ti kha zoh.
chin_hakha.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_w: Ruahchannak (ca luatte — a hmaanmi phi a um lo): Palette pakhat kha zeinih dah aa rem tein asiloah aa rem lo tein a chuahter?
chin_hakha.stuck_show_open_prompts_no_answers: 🤔 Ka i hnawh — halnak a luatmi langhter (phi a um lo)
chin_hakha.open_prompts_investigate_by_manipulati: Halnak a luatmi — thlen law zoh:
chin_hakha.find_the_smallest_palette_that_still_f: Nangmah caah "a tling" ti a langh rihmi palette a te bik kha hmuh.
chin_hakha.real_impressionists_used_analogous_pal: Impressionist milem sertu taktak hna nih analogous palette an hmang. Zeiruangah dah cutin an tuah?
chin_hakha.some_color_schemes_have_proper_names_c: Rong ṭhenṭhennak cheukhat cu min an ngei (complementary, split-complementary, triadic). Cu minhna kha kawl law ser ṭhan tum.
chin_hakha.high_saturation_many_colors_busy_try_d: Saturation a sang + rong tampi = a buai. Chawhnak slider in saturation tlawmter tum — "aa remnak" ah zeidah a cang?
chin_hakha.i_think_i_understand_color_harmony_now: Atu ah rong aa remnak ka hngalh cang ti ka ruat — keimah bia in ka chim lai
chin_hakha.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_hue_s: Nangmah bia in chim: hue hlatnak, saturation, le palette a zauzat nih "aa remnak" zeitindah an khiah?
chin_hakha.design_note_discrete_5_state_harmony_m: Design kong: aa remnak mark cu phun 5 lawng a si; SVG chakuang nih palette hmun a langhter; "palette ṭha" ti mark a um lo — cutin ser a si.
chin_hakha.the_path_traced_by_a_point_on_a_small_: — aa lawnmi tete cungah point pakhat nih a lianmi chungah a vak lioah a suaimi lam kha a si. Milem cu
chin_hakha.greatest_common_divisor_of_the_two_rad: (a ṭhen khawhmi nambat lian bik) radius pahnih chungin a chuak. R/r cu ratio a fawimi a si tikah pangpar a tlawm; ratio a harmi nih aa cang ṭhan lomi lam a buaimi a chuahter.
chin_hakha.generative_art_canvas: Amah in a i sermi milem hmun
chin_hakha.click_or_drag_on_the_canvas_to_create_: 👆 Thil tete puakcheh ser awkah hmun cungah hmet asiloah kaih
chin_hakha.click_and_drag_to_drip_paint_on_the_sp: 👆 A vakmi hmun cungah rong ṭum awkah hmet law kaih
chin_hakha.in_a_spinning_reference_frame_objects_: A vakmi hmun chungah, thil hna nih laipi in an hlatzat le vaknak a rannak a i letmi (ω²r) he aa tluk in a leng lam ah thawhnak an hmuh.
chin_hakha.real_spin_art_uses_centripetal_acceler: Vaknak milem taktak nih rong theh awkah laipi lam thawhnak a hmang. Rong a hlawnmi cu a rangtein a leng lam ah a zuang; rong a thangmi nih lam a tawi deuh i uk khawh a fawimi a chuahter.
chin_hakha.the_combination_of_rotational_motion_a: Vaknak le rong a thangzat aa pehtlaih tikah vaknak le interference milem cu amah te in a chuak. Vaknak milem pahnih cu zeitikhmanh ah aa lo lo — hi cu
chin_hakha.string_art_creates: Hri milem nih a chuahtermi cu
chin_hakha.from_straight_lines_with_a_circle_and_: lam a dingmi chungin a si. Aa lomi le letnak 2 he ahcun,
chin_hakha.the_heart_shaped_curve_seen_in_coffee_: — lungthin bantuk kawinak, coffee hrai chungah kan hmuhmi kha na hmuh. Letnak 3 nih
chin_hakha.higher_multipliers_create_intricate_pa: a chuahter. Letnak a lian deuh nih
chin_hakha.nail_n_connects_to_nail_n_m_mod_total: a zulmi milem a buaimi a chuahter: nail N cu nail (N × M) mod a dihlak he aa pehtlaih.
chin_hakha.optical_art_emerged_in_the_1960s_pione: (Optical Art) cu 1960 kum ah a chuak, a hmasa bik in a tuahtu cu
chin_hakha.it_exploits_the_mechanics_of_human_vis: . Minung mit a ṭuanning kha hmang in hmun a phaimi cungah nithlanak, ṭhinlaunak, le a thuknak hlennak a chuahter.
chin_hakha.appear_when_two_regular_grids_overlap_: cu grid a i tluk pahnih cu tete tein aa kawi in an i cheh tikah a chuak. Na thluak nih milem aa dohmi kha a ṭhen kho lo caah, a um lomi kawinak le tikhual a chuahter. Hi thawhnak nih puan cheukhat cungah ceunak a langhter ve.
chin_hakha.occur_when_highly_saturated_complement: cu saturation a sangmi rong aa remmi hna a pawngkhat tein an um tikah a chuak. Na mit chungah rong a hmuhtu hna nih an i dou i, a ding lomi kam a chuak — hi cu
chin_hakha.in_the_retina_are_the_main_perceptual_: cu retina chungah a ummi hmuhnak lam biapi bik an si. Kuang aa kulhmi milem nih duh lo tein mit a nithlan ter, cucaah milem cu a thawh le a ṭhinlau bantuk in a langh.
chin_hakha.or_tiling_covers_a_plane_with_shapes_t: (asiloah tiling) nih hmun phaimi kha aa remtu hmuhning in a khuh i, kuar le a i cheh a um lo. Polygon a i tlukmi pathum lawng nih an te in an khuh khawh:
chin_hakha.equilateral_triangles: kil pathum a kam aa tlukmi
chin_hakha.1898_1972_transformed_simple_tilings_i: (1898–1972) nih tile kam kha kawi in tiling a fawimi kha milem ah a thlen. A hmanmi lam: hmuhning kam pakhat kha kawi law cu kawinak kha a ralkhat kam ah copy — cutin tile hna cu ṭha tein an i rem rih. Hi cu
chin_hakha.uses_tessellations_extensively_combini: nih tessellation tampi a hmang — arfi, kil paruk, le aa pehtlaihmi milem Alhambra bantuk biakinn chungah kan hmuhmi kha a chawh. Hi milem hna nih nambat phunglam a harmi an zul nain hmuhnak lamah a dawh tuk.
chin_hakha.tessellations_use_three_key_operations: Tessellation nih rian biapi pathum a hmang —
chin_hakha.flip_every_tessellation_can_be_classif: (leh). Tessellation vialte cu 'wallpaper phun 17' chungah pakhat ah ṭhen khawh a si.
chin_hakha.click_tiles_to_cycle_their_colors: 👆 An rong thlen awkah tile kha hmet
chin_hakha.is_generated_by_iterating_z_z_c_for_ev: cu complex hmun chungah point c pakhat cio caah z = z² + c kha let in ser a si. |z| a i khiah rihmi (2 a pel lomi) point hna cu set chungah an um. A kam nih
chin_hakha.at_every_scale: a zauzat kip ah a langhter.
chin_hakha.use_the_same_formula_but_fix_c_and_var: nih formula pakhat kha an hmang ve nain c kha an chiah dingmang i a thawknak z kha an thlen. Mandelbrot point pakhat cio nih Julia set a dangdang a chuahter — Mandelbrot chungah a ummi point nih aa pehtlaihmi Julia a chuahter; a lengah a ummi nih vutkhuh bantuk 'Fatou sets' a chuahter.
chin_hakha.fractal_modifies_the_iteration_to_z_re: fractal nih letnak kha z = (|Re(z)| + i|Im(z)|)² + c ah a thlen i, mei a alhmi lawng bantuk aa tluk lomi hmuhning a chuahter. Michael Michelitsch le Otto Rössler nih 1992 ah an hmuh.
chin_hakha.is_built_by_the_chaos_game_pick_a_rand: cu 'buainak lentecelh' in ser a si: point pakhat thim, cun thim hngalh lomi kil pakhat lam ah lam chanh tiang kha let te te in zuang. Khuaruahhar lo in, hngalh lo tein a i tuahmi hi nih amah he aa lo dingmangmi fractal a chuahter.
chin_hakha.1924_2010_coined_the_word_fractal_from: (1924–2010) nih Latin bia 'fractus' (a ttihmi) chungin 'fractal' ti bia a chuahter. Tikulh kam, tlang, thi hri, le tangka dawr hna nih fractal geometry an ngei vialte ti kha a langhter —
chin_hakha.double_click_to_zoom_in_scroll_wheel_t: 👆 Lianter awkah voihnih hmet • Lianter/tlawmter awkah scroll chakuang hmang
chin_hakha.screens_create_gradients_by_mixing: 🌈 Computer hmai nih gradient a chuahtermi cu
chin_hakha.each_pixel_blends_red_green_and_blue_l: a chawh ruangah a si. Pixel pakhat cio nih ceunak sen, hring, le duum kha thazang phundang in a chawh. Gradient nih cu nambat kha hmun chungah nem tein a thlen.
chin_hakha.produces_more_perceptually_uniform_gra: nih RGB nakin mit caah aa tluk deuhmi gradient a chuahter. RGB chungah sen in duum ah kal ahcun a hnaupmi a thim kan pel; HSL chungah cun a ceumi duum-sen kan pel — rong sertu nih a chawh ning bantuk in.
chin_hakha.are_everywhere_sunsets_rayleigh_scatte: cu hmun kip ah an um: ni tlaknak (Rayleigh scattering nih ceunak a sau zat a ṭhen), van chakuang (ceunak a kawi tikah frequency in a ṭhen), le rilipi a thuknak (ti nih sen kha a hmasa bik in a in, duum a thukmi lawng a tang).
chin_hakha.sweep_color_around_a_center_point_like: nih rong chakuang bantuk in laipi kulhin rong a theh. Pie chart, a kuangmi lo hngahnak, le data langhternak ah hman a si. CSS nih conic-gradient kha 2020 ah lawng a bawmh!
chin_hakha.use_gradients_to_create_depth_direct_a: nih a thuknak chuahter awk, mit hruai awk, le lungthin thawh ter awkah gradient an hmang. A lum in a dai ah a kalmi gradient nih a thuknak a langhter (atmospheric perspective); ceunak in a thim ah a kalmi nih a lianzat a langhter (chiaroscuro).
chin_hakha.describe_an_object_for_a_depth_map_or_: A thuknak map caah thil pakhat asiloah milem caah hmuhning ṭial...
chin_hakha.white_pops_out_gray_middle_black_far: A rang = a chuak • A hnaup = a lai • A thim = a hla
chin_hakha.your_eyes_are_6_cm_apart: Na mit cu cm 6 hrawng an i hla
chin_hakha.so_each_sees_the_world_from_a_slightly: , cucaah pakhat cio nih vawlei kha a kawinak dang tein an hmuh. Na thluak nih hmuhnak pahnih kha a pehtlaih i
chin_hakha.magic_eye_images_hide_3d_shapes_in_a_r: (Magic Eye™ milem) nih aa cang ṭheumi milem chungah 3D hmuhning a thuh. A lam cu: thil thuhmi cu 'a naih' hmun ah milem cu
chin_hakha.where_it_s_far_the_period_is_longer_yo: a cang ṭhan; 'a hla' hmun ah cun a sau deuh. Na thluak nih hi a dannak kha a thuknak in a hngalh.
chin_hakha.1993_94_by_tom_baccei_and_cheri_smith_: (1993–94) Tom Baccei le Cheri Smith nih an ṭialmi cu vawlei pumpi ah milion 25 nak tam an zuar. Autostereogram lam hi Dr. Christopher Tyler nih 1979 ah a hmasa bik in a hman.
chin_hakha.to_see_the_image_hold_your_face_close_: 🧠 Milem hmuh awkah: na hmai kha computer hmai ah naihter, na mit kha na hla lam bang a zohmi bantuk in luatter, cun tlaihte in hnu lam ah kir. 3D hmuhning cu a chuak lai. Hi cu
chin_hakha.have_difficulty_seeing_stereograms_due: cu amblyopia (mit a thatlau), strabismus (mit aa kawi), asiloah mit pahnih hmuhnak a dangmi ruangah stereogram hmuh a har. Hi hi a ṭhalo lo!
chin_hakha.relax_your_eyes_and_look_through_the_i: Na mit luatter law 3D hmuh awkah milem kha a chung tiang zoh
chin_hakha.hold_your_face_close_to_the_screen: Na hmai kha computer hmai ah naihter
chin_hakha.relax_your_eyes_try_to_look_through_th: Na mit luatter — milem a hnu lam bang a zohmi bantuk in zoh tum
chin_hakha.slowly_move_back_a_3d_shape_will_emerg: Tlaihte in hnu lam ah kir. 3D hmuhning a chuak lai!
chin_hakha.tip_the_two_guide_dots_above_should_ap: Ruahnak: a cung ah a ummi hruainak point pahnih cu na mit a hmaan tein a um tikah pathum in an langh ding a si
chin_hakha.create_animated_3d_stereograms_from_pr: A i ser cangmi, namah suainak, milem na chiahmi, transform, asiloah AI nih a sermi a thuknak map hna in a nunmi 3D stereogram ser!
chin_hakha.draw_a_depth_map_capture_it_as_a_keyfr: A thuknak map suai law keyframe in tuah, cun a dawtmi suai. Nunnak nih an karlak kha a pehtlaih lai.
chin_hakha.upload_a_grayscale_image_white_near_bl: A hnaupmi milem chiah (a rang = a naih, a thim = a hla). Transform na thimmi in nunter a si lai.
chin_hakha.depth_map_loaded_400_400: ✅ A thuknak map a lut cang (400×400)
chin_hakha.animates_the_depth_map_from_the_static: A dirmi tab chungin a thuknak map kha na thimmi transform in a nunter. Na map suai hmasa awkah A dirmi lam ah kal hmasa.
chin_hakha.tip_draw_a_depth_map_in_the_static_tab: 💡 Ruahnak: A dirmi tab chungah a thuknak map suai hmasa, cun transform in nunter awkah hika ah kir.
chin_hakha.ai_generated_depth_map: 🤖 AI nih A Sermi A Thuknak Map
chin_hakha.describe_a_3d_scene_and_ai_will_genera: 3D hmuhning ṭial law AI nih a thuknak map a ser lai, cun transform in a nunter lai.
chin_hakha.e_g_a_glowing_crystal_orb_floating_in_: tahchunhnak: Van chungah a zamdimmi crystal bawrbal a ceumi...
chin_hakha.generate_ai_depth_map_for_animation: Nunnak caah AI A Thuknak Map Ser
chin_hakha.ai_depth_map_ready: ✅ AI a thuknak map a tling cang!
chin_hakha.ai_motion_calls_gemini_to_plan_poses_t: AI Nithlanak nih dirhning tuah awkah Gemini a ko i, cun Imagen nih frame pakhat cio kha amah a thuknak map in a ser. Frame pakhat ah ~5–7s; rate-limit a pel lo.
chin_hakha.ai_image_generation_is_not_available_u: ⚠️ AI milem sernak a um lo. Preset, Suai, Chiah, asiloah Thlen lam hmang.
chin_hakha.relax_your_eyes_and_look_through_the_a: Na mit luatter law 3D hmuhning an nithlan kha hmuh awkah nunnak a chung tiang zoh
chin_hakha.lock_your_eyes_into_the_3d_view_before: Play na hmet hlanah na mit kha 3D zohnak ah chiah dingmang
chin_hakha.slower_speeds_4_6_fps_are_easier_to_ma: A tlaihmi a rannak (4–6 FPS) cu zohnak tlaih awk a fawi deuh
chin_hakha.pulse_and_heart_presets_are_the_easies: Ṭhennak le Lungthin preset cu an nithlan lioah hmuh awk a fawi bik
chin_hakha.the_exported_gif_can_be_printed_frame_: GIF na chuahpimi cu frame te te in cabu ah chuah khawh a si, milem a nunmi cauk bantuk in!
